instructions.name: add_market_to_group

errors.name: CurveAlreadyCompleted
errors.msg: Can not swap after the curve is completed

errors.name: ReturnAmountTooSmall
errors.msg: Return amount is too small compared to the minimum received amount

errors.name: NotWhiteList
errors.msg: This creator is not in whitelist

errors.name: InsufficientTokens
errors.msg: Not enough tokens to complete the sell order.

errors.name: InsufficientSol
errors.msg: Not enough SOL received to be valid.

errors.name: NotBondingCurveMint
errors.msg: This token is not a bonding curve token

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Market name or question exceeds max length

errors.name: RESOLUTIONYESAMOUNTERROR
errors.msg: The winner yes token amount error.

errors.name: RESOLUTIONNOAMOUNTERROR
errors.msg: The winner no token amount error.

errors.name: FeatureDisabled
errors.msg: Feature disabled - would break bonding curve

errors.name: EndDateInPast
errors.msg: end_date must be in the future

errors.name: OracleOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle feed not owned by Switchboard program

errors.name: InvalidOracleData
errors.msg: Oracle data has no valid samples

errors.name: OracleNotConfigured
errors.msg: Oracle feed not configured for this market

errors.name: MarketNotExpired
errors.msg: Market has not reached ending slot

errors.name: IncompleteOracleConfig
errors.msg: Oracle config incomplete: oracle_feed, price_target, and comparison_type must all be set together

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL in vault for this operation

errors.name: ManualResolutionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Cannot manually resolve a market configured with oracle feed

errors.name: NoTimeConstraint
errors.msg: Market must have at least one time constraint (end_date or ending_slot)

errors.name: CombinedFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Combined fees (platform + LP) exceed maximum allowed per side

errors.name: FeeInvariantViolation
errors.msg: Fee invariant violated: platform_fee + lp_fee + net_amount != gross amount

errors.name: MarketV1NotFound
errors.msg: MarketV1Config not found — this is a v0 market

errors.name: UseV2Instructions
errors.msg: Market is v1 — use v2 instructions

errors.name: StaleMerkleRoot
errors.msg: Stale Merkle root in SP1 proof

errors.name: MarketNotInGroup
errors.msg: Market is not in this group

errors.name: MarketAlreadyInGroup
errors.msg: Market is already in this group

errors.name: GroupAlreadyHasWinner
errors.msg: Mutually exclusive group already has a YES winner

errors.name: GroupOracleNotConfigured
errors.msg: Oracle not configured for this group

errors.name: GroupNotExpired
errors.msg: Group has not reached end date

errors.name: ThresholdsNotSorted
errors.msg: Price thresholds must be sorted ascending

errors.name: ThresholdCountMismatch
errors.msg: Threshold count must equal markets count minus one

errors.name: MissingSubMarketAccounts
errors.msg: All sub-markets must be passed as remaining accounts

errors.name: NegRiskNotEnabled
errors.msg: NegRisk conversion is not enabled for this group

errors.name: CollateralMismatch
errors.msg: Collateral per pair mismatch across group markets

errors.name: NegRiskGroupTooLarge
errors.msg: NegRisk group exceeds maximum market count

errors.name: CannotSelectAllMarkets
errors.msg: Cannot select all markets for conversion

errors.name: IndicesNotSorted
errors.msg: Selected market indices must be sorted ascending

errors.name: AmountNotAligned
errors.msg: Amount must be aligned to TOKEN_MULTIPLIER

errors.name: GroupNotMutuallyExclusive
errors.msg: Group must be mutually exclusive for NegRisk

errors.name: CannotModifyNegRiskGroup
errors.msg: Cannot modify group with active NegRisk config

types.name: BitShard
docs: BitShard account for storing nullifiers
Uses prefix-based routing for efficient lookups

fields.name: prefix_len
docs: How many bits of the nullifier we've consumed for routing

fields.name: prefix
docs: The prefix bits (left-aligned in this array)

fields.name: count
docs: Count of nullifiers in this shard

fields.name: nullifiers
docs: Sorted list of nullifier hashes (for binary search)

fields.name: reward_pool_vault
docs: The reward pool vault PDA address (receives share of platform fees)
When Pubkey::default(), fee splitting is disabled (all goes to team_wallet)

fields.name: oyrade_mint
docs: The OYRADE SPL token mint address (for holder discount verification)
When Pubkey::default(), holder discount is disabled

fields.name: staking_fee_share_bps
docs: Share of platform_fee sent to reward pool, in BPS (e.g., 3000 = 30%)

fields.name: tier_bronze_min
docs: Bronze tier: minimum staked OYRADE (e.g., 1_000 * 10^6)

fields.name: tier_bronze_discount_bps
docs: Bronze tier: discount in BPS (e.g., 1000 = 10%)

fields.name: tier_silver_min
docs: Silver tier: minimum staked OYRADE (e.g., 10_000 * 10^6)

fields.name: tier_silver_discount_bps
docs: Silver tier: discount in BPS (e.g., 2000 = 20%)

fields.name: tier_gold_min
docs: Gold tier: minimum staked OYRADE (e.g., 50_000 * 10^6)

fields.name: tier_gold_discount_bps
docs: Gold tier: discount in BPS (e.g., 3000 = 30%)

fields.name: tier_diamond_min
docs: Diamond tier: minimum staked OYRADE (e.g., 100_000 * 10^6)

fields.name: tier_diamond_discount_bps
docs: Diamond tier: discount in BPS (e.g., 4000 = 40%)

fields.name: reward_pool_program
docs: The reward pool program ID (for StakeUser PDA verification)

fields.name: sp1_vkey_hash
docs: SP1 verification key hash. When [0u8; 32], SP1 verification is skipped (dev mode).

fields.name: market_name
docs: Market name / ticker stored on-chain (max 32 chars)

fields.name: question
docs: Market question stored on-chain (max 100 chars)

fields.name: slug
docs: URL-friendly slug (max 128 chars)

fields.name: image_url
docs: Market image URL (max 256 chars)

fields.name: source
docs: Source (e.g. Pumpfun) (max 32 chars)

fields.name: category
docs: Category (e.g. Crypto, Politics) (max 32 chars)

fields.name: start_date
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market opens for trading

fields.name: end_date
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market closes

fields.name: oracle_feed
docs: Switchboard feed pubkey for automated resolution

fields.name: price_target
docs: Target value for comparison (scaled integer matching oracle precision)

fields.name: comparison_type
docs: Comparison type: 0=GT, 1=LT, 2=EQ

fields.name: metric_type
docs: Metric type for UI: 0=price, 1=mcap, 2=curve_pct

fields.name: collateral_per_pair
docs: Face value of collateral per YES+NO pair (lamports).

fields.name: market_name
docs: Human-readable market name / ticker (e.g. "TRUMP2024")

fields.name: question
docs: Market question (e.g. "Will X happen?")

fields.name: slug
docs: URL-friendly identifier (e.g. "whitewhale-price-tomorrow-at-12am-est-above-090")

fields.name: image_url
docs: Market image URL

fields.name: source
docs: Source of the market (e.g. "Pumpfun", "Oyrade")

fields.name: category
docs: Category (e.g. "Crypto", "Politics")

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the market was created

fields.name: start_date
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market opens for trading

fields.name: end_date
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market closes

fields.name: oracle_feed
docs: Switchboard feed address for automated resolution

fields.name: price_target
docs: Target value for comparison (scaled integer, e.g. lamports or 18-decimal)

fields.name: comparison_type
docs: Comparison type: 0=GT (greater than), 1=LT (less than), 2=EQ (equal within 0.1%)

fields.name: metric_type
docs: Metric type for UI display: 0=price, 1=mcap, 2=curve_pct (informational only)

fields.name: oracle_resolution_finished
docs: Whether oracle resolution has been finalized (prevents double-resolution)

fields.name: resolved_at
docs: Unix timestamp when resolution occurred

fields.name: resolved_by
docs: Resolution source: 0=admin, 1=oracle, 2=voided

fields.name: is_voided
docs: Whether the market has been voided/cancelled (refunds available)

types.name: MarketGroupConfig
docs: Configuration for NegRisk position conversion on mutually exclusive market groups.
Enables atomic conversion: burn NO on k selected markets, mint YES on remaining (N-k) markets,
release (k-1) * pairs * collateral_per_pair SOL to user.
PDA seeds: ["market_group_config", market_group.key()]

types.name: MarketV1Config
docs: Configuration for v1 Conditional Token markets.
In v1 markets, each YES+NO pair is backed by exactly `collateral_per_pair` lamports.
The AMM is a single YES/NO constant-product pool (no SOL moves during swaps).
Winning tokens redeem at fixed face value: tokens * collateral_per_pair / TOKEN_MULTIPLIER.
PDA seeds: ["market_v1_config", market.key()]

fields.name: market
docs: The market this config belongs to

fields.name: collateral_per_pair
docs: Face value of collateral per YES+NO pair (lamports)

fields.name: total_collateral_deposited
docs: Total SOL collateral deposited into this market

fields.name: total_pairs_minted
docs: Total token pairs minted (each pair = TOKEN_MULTIPLIER YES + TOKEN_MULTIPLIER NO)

fields.name: amm_yes_reserves
docs: YES token reserves in the AMM pool

fields.name: amm_no_reserves
docs: NO token reserves in the AMM pool

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: MerkleMountainRange
docs: Merkle Mountain Range state for storing commitments
This structure efficiently stores commitments without requiring the full tree

fields.name: merkle_root_batch
docs: Current merkle root of the batch (16 leaves)

fields.name: batch_leaves
docs: Leaves array of size 16 (current batch buffer)

fields.name: identifier
docs: Unique identifier for this pool

fields.name: min_deposit_amount
docs: Minimum deposit amount (in lamports)

fields.name: whole_tree_root
docs: Root of the entire tree (computed from peaks)

fields.name: last_small_tree_root
docs: Root of the last completed small tree (for indexing)

fields.name: batch_number
docs: Current batch number (increments every 16 leaves)

fields.name: peaks
docs: Peaks array for MMR structure

fields.name: depth
docs: Depth of each peak

fields.name: number_of_peaks
docs: Number of active peaks

fields.name: max_leaves
docs: Maximum leaves this pool can hold

types.name: ShieldedMarketPool
docs: Shielded Market Pool - Links MMR to a prediction market
This enables privacy-preserving betting for VIP users

fields.name: mmr
docs: The Merkle Mountain Range for storing commitments

fields.name: market
docs: The prediction market this pool is linked to

fields.name: shielded_sol_balance
docs: Total shielded SOL balance in the pool

fields.name: shielded_yes_count
docs: Count of shielded YES position commitments

fields.name: shielded_no_count
docs: Count of shielded NO position commitments

fields.name: authority
docs: Pool authority (usually the market creator or admin)

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the pool is active

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

fields.name: pool_fees_collected
docs: Accumulated pool fees (POOL_FEE from shielded operations) not tracked in shielded_sol_balance

types.name: TeeRegistry
docs: Global registry of authorized TEE operator pubkeys.
Only operators listed here can call `tee_batch_sell` / `tee_batch_claim`.
PDA: seeds = [b"tee_registry"], bump
Space: 8 (discriminator) + 32 (authority) + (4 + 32*10) (operators vec) + 1 (bump) = 365

fields.name: authority
docs: The admin authority (copied from Config.authority at init time)

fields.name: operators
docs: Registered TEE operator pubkeys (max 10)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed
